description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can of beer with a dark, nearly black background and bold red and yellow graphics. The can features a large, stylized animal graphic wrapping around its body, with prominent blocky text and additional information in smaller fonts. The top of the can is silver with a pull tab, which is red and yellow and marked with the word 'PULL' in white. The can's label includes detailed product information, instructions, and warnings, all in high-contrast red and yellow against the dark background. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, with a focus on strong visual contrast and clear branding.
description: A dark aluminum beer can with bold red and yellow graphics, featuring a large animal motif and a prominent pull tab on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label, large animal graphic, and bold red and yellow text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying product information, warnings, and part of the pull tab.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the pull tab and a block of instructional text.
description_view_3: Side view with visible instructions and part of the animal graphic, as well as the pull tab from the side.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, high-contrast design with a large stylized animal graphic, blocky red and yellow text, and clear instructions. The overall style is modern and visually striking, with a focus on readability and strong color contrast.
